title: Prepare safe operating procedures for calibration of equipment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare safe operating procedures for calibration of equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify equipment requiring calibration procedures

pcs.text: Assess the skill of operators in calibration in consultation with operators and supervisors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the skill of operators in calibration in consultation with operators and supervisors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the skill of operators in calibration in consultation with operators and supervisors.

pcs.text: Identify, source and interpret information required for calibration from equipment manufacture and operating instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, source and interpret information required for calibration from equipment manufacture and operating instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, source and interpret information required for calibration from equipment manufacture and operating instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify equipment requiring calibration procedures

elements.title: Prepare calibration procedure

pcs.text: Confirm information in calibration procedure complies with relevant regulatory requirements, manufacturers' instructions and industry practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm information in calibration procedure complies with relevant regulatory requirements, manufacturers' instructions and industry practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm information in calibration procedure complies with relevant regulatory requirements, manufacturers' instructions and industry practice.

pcs.text: Carry out a risk assessment of the calibration procedure and incorporate risk controls in the calibration procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out a risk assessment of the calibration procedure and incorporate risk controls in the calibration procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out a risk assessment of the calibration procedure and incorporate risk controls in the calibration procedure.

pcs.text: Document the procedures in a form appropriate to the intended use and according to workplace protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the procedures in a form appropriate to the intended use and according to workplace protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the procedures in a form appropriate to the intended use and according to workplace protocols.

pcs.text: Document health and safety in the workplace issues relevant to the activities in the procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document health and safety in the workplace issues relevant to the activities in the procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document health and safety in the workplace issues relevant to the activities in the procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare calibration procedure
